outlook.summary: Extreme bearish positioning detected with PCR 2.27-3.52 across all expiries. Negative GEX structure creates volatile environment favorable to downside acceleration. Max Pain at 645 (0DTE) near spot acts as magnetic attractor. Key resonance support at 640/630. Watch for potential contrarian bounce if 640 holds firmly.

levels.motivazione: Critical structural pivot where cumulative gamma exposure changes sign. Below this level dealers accelerate selling pressure through delta hedging.
Resonance level across all three expiries with massive PUT OI concentration (19,623/14,842/101,119). Primary dealer hedge zone with extreme volume activity.
0DTE Max Pain level combined with significant PUT OI (23,353). Strong price magnet zone near current spot creates pinning risk.
Dominant CALL OI (17,742) in 0DTE creates resistance above spot. Combined with PUT OI (24,482) forms sticky friction zone.
Resonance support across all expiries with dominant PUT OI (25,514/144,699/116,292). Major structural floor with bearish skew confirmation.
